content: Phase 1: Foundation Enhancement - Integrate component system with existing packages (timing, scheduling, devices)
Finalize revolutionary component system as the ONLY experiment definition approach
Update @psyforge/forgescript to work seamlessly with timing, scheduling, and devices packages
Update Sprint 3 planning to include component-driven architecture instead of basic GUI
Integrate component validation into existing quality pipeline
Ensure component system meets <2ms frame budget requirements
Remove all legacy fluent API code and focus purely on component architecture
Plan Monaco editor integration with component IntelliSense for Sprint 3
Prepare component system for CRDT synchronization in Sprint 4
Update project documentation to reflect component system as the primary approach
